articles.title: Spain outplay Messi’s Argentina to reach World Cup summit - Financial Times
articles.description: Tournament’s best team wins one-sided final 1-0 and claims clutch of individual prizes

articles.title: Trump loomed over the World Cup, up until the awkward trophy ceremony - The Washington Post
articles.description: The president was loudly booed as he entered the field after Spain's win, waving to people as he made his way to the stage.

articles.title: Sam Presti Calls Lu Dort Trade "A Financial Decision" - Hoops Rumors
articles.description: Sam Presti discussed the Thunder's trade with the Hawks that sent out Lu Dort and brought back three second-round picks.

articles.title: Why Conor McGregor calls his exact knee injury 'quite shocking' after finding out results - Fox News
articles.description: Conor McGregor revealed he suffered ACL and meniscus injuries in his right knee during the UFC 329 loss to Max Holloway, mirroring their first fight.

articles.title: Lionel Messi's 2007 Photo with Baby Lamine Yamal Confirmed Real by UNICEF - Yahoo Sports
Watch Madonna, the Muppets, and More Perform at 2026 World Cup Final Halftime - Pitchfork
articles.description: The 11-minute spectacle included performances by Shakira, Justin Bieber, BTS, Burna Boy, and Coldplay’s Chris Martin

articles.title: Tom Cruise and Half of Hollywood Light Up 2026 World Cup Final While Trump Is Booed - Variety
articles.description: The movie star, who is promoting the heck out of his new film “Digger,” put his stamp on Sunday’s World Cup final, and was joined by half of Hollywood.

articles.title: DeChambeau is not a cheater - Scheffler - BBC
articles.description: World number one Scottie Scheffler insists Bryson DeChambeau is "definitely not a cheater" as the rules incident which overshadowed The Open rumbles on.

articles.title: Navasota man arrested, charged with manslaughter in death of boxer Hannah Rapp - KBTX News 3
articles.description: A man has been arrested after Brazos County deputies say he stopped in the roadway, shifted into reverse and accelerated backward into a bicyclist—killing her on FM 159.
